details: Package ulid-xyz@2.12.3 was scanned but no concrete findings are available for adjudication. The name resembles the widely-used 'ulid' package, which is a name-similarity signal worth a human look, but no payload evidence (exfiltration, install-time fetch+execute, silent-relay, credential distribution, dropper, or backdoor) has been confirmed in the package's files. With no concrete installer-harm evidence and no traced-code corroboration, a published block verdict would overclaim. Route to human review to confirm whether the package is a benign ULID utility, an abandoned name-similar package, or a typosquat with payload.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
